title: elymus hispidus subsp. pulcherrimus
intro: Elymus hispidus subsp. pulcherrimus, also known as the hairy wheatgrass or bearded wheat grass, is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus hispidus subsp. pulcherrimus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also sometimes used in dietary supplements.
